---
applyTo: "output/architect/**"
---

# Architect plan progress tracking

When implementing an architect-generated plan under `output\architect\` (a `*-plan.md`), **record your progress directly in that plan file as you go**:

- Mark every **completed** phase and step with ✅ (the built-in green check) — e.g. prefix its heading: `### ✅ Step 2.1: ...`.
- Mark the phase/step **currently being worked on** with 🚧
- Move the marks **the moment** status changes (start → 🚧, finish → ✅) — incrementally, not in one batch at the end — so the plan always reflects the true state of the work.
- Leave not-yet-started items **unmarked**.
- Use these symbols **consistently** throughout the whole file.
